text:
Once upon a time, there was a curious little squirrel named Spike.

Every day after school, Spike scampered across the forest floor, gathering acorns. Today, however, Spike had an unusual plan.

Finding a map he'd gotten from Oliver Owl, Spike envisioned uncovering a long-lost cave full of peculiar pottery. His determination was powerful. He dashed up oak branches, his tail flicking pinecones like tiny flags.

After hours of zigzagging through foliage, Spike finally reached the cave entrance. Its gaping mouth exuded an eerie glow.

Instead of pottery, Spike discovered something far weirder inside. It was a secret book written in an indecipherable script. The cover illustration was an odd silhouette.

Curiosity getting the better of him, Spike opened it. Pages after pages, strange symbols floated before his eyes. A voice echoed, mysterious.

"The secrets that await are within each leaf. Find balance, and wisdom shall flourish."

Spike pondered. He closed his eyes
